entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Pennisetum glaucum, the target crop for improvement research

entities.name: ERGOT
entities.description: Claviceps fusiformis, the pathogen causing ergot disease in pearl millet

entities.name: ERGOT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of pearl millet to resist infection by Claviceps fusiformis

entities.name: ICRISAT CENTER
entities.description: The research center where the ergot resistance studies were conducted

entities.name: FIELD SCREENING TECHNIQUE
entities.description: A method developed to identify ergot-resistant pearl millet lines

entities.name: PATHOGEN BIOLOGY
entities.description: The biological characteristics of the ergot pathogen

entities.name: DISEASE EPIDEMIOLOGY
entities.description: The study of the patterns and causes of ergot disease spread

entities.name: POLLINATION
entities.description: The process of pollen transfer affecting ergot infection and resistance identification

entities.name: ERGOT INFECTION
entities.description: The state of pearl millet being infected by the ergot pathogen

entities.name: PEDIGREE BREEDING
entities.description: A breeding method used to select and improve ergot-resistant lines

entities.name: SMUT
entities.description: A disease used to characterize the reactions of ergot-resistant lines

entities.name: DOWNY MILDEW
entities.description: A disease used to characterize the reactions of ergot-resistant lines

entities.name: RUST
entities.description: A disease used to characterize the reactions of ergot-resistant lines

entities.name: AGRONOMIC TRAITS
entities.description: General agricultural characteristics used to evaluate ergot-resistant lines

entities.name: MALE-STERILE LINES
entities.description: Lines lacking functional pollen used in the production of hybrids

entities.name: HYBRIDS
entities.description: Cross-bred pearl millet varieties developed from ergot-resistant parents

entities.name: OPEN-POLLINATED VARIETIES
entities.description: Pearl millet varieties developed through open pollination using resistant sources
